signals.idea: Smooth the video editor layout transition when panes lock/unlock. Currently locking the generations pane causes an instant jump from standard layout (stacked preview+timeline) to condensed layout (side-by-side) because line 148 of VideoEditorShell.tsx does  — the isGenerationsPaneLocked flag instantly flips the layout. Fix: (1) Remove isGenerationsPaneLocked from the condensed calculation — let the ResizeObserver naturally detect the height change as LayoutMainContent animates the bottom padding over 300ms. (2) Add CSS transitions to the grid layout change so the preview/timeline panels animate their size change smoothly instead of jumping. The container already has willChange and transition classes. (3) Keep it lightweight — no layout animation libraries, just CSS transitions on the grid template rows and opacity/transform on the panels swapping. Key file: src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorShell.tsx. The ResizeObserver on line 141 already handles tooSmall detection, so removing the isGenerationsPaneLocked override lets it work naturally with the animated padding.
signals.loop_summary: Iteration 1. Weighted score trajectory: 0. Plan deltas: n/a. Recurring critiques: 0. Resolved flags: 0. Open significant flags: 0.

items.criterion: Locking the generations pane does NOT cause an instant layout jump — the layout transitions to condensed only after the LayoutMainContent padding animation reduces available height below MIN_STANDARD_HEIGHT
Unlocking the generations pane transitions back to standard layout when the container height exceeds MIN_STANDARD_HEIGHT
forceCondensed (compact mode) still forces condensed layout immediately without animation
All existing tests pass without modification (or are updated if they test the changed behavior)
No layout animation libraries added — only CSS transitions
The layout swap includes an opacity/transform transition so it doesn't feel like a hard cut
No flickering or rapid toggling between condensed/standard during the padding animation
Standard layout grid-template-rows changes (timeline maximize/restore) also animate smoothly
Total lines changed is under ~20 (proportional to the scope of the fix)
Manual smoke test: lock pane, unlock pane, resize window, compact mode all behave correctly
